title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
description:
You are given an array `prices` where `prices[i]` is the price of a stock on the `i`th day.

You want to maximize profit by choosing a single day to buy and a different day in the future to sell.

Return the maximum profit you can achieve from this transaction. If you cannot achieve any profit, return `0`.

examples.explanation: Buy on day 2 (price = 1) and sell on day 5 (price = 6), profit = 6-1 = 5.

hint_plan.level_1: Track the best profit seen so far while scanning prices in order.
hint_plan.level_2: Keep the minimum price seen before today; profit if sold today is price - min_so_far.
hint_plan.level_3: One pass: update minimum buy price and maximum profit at each step.
hint_plan.level_4: Initialize min_price = prices[0], best = 0; for p in prices[1:]: best = max(best, p - min_price); min_price = min(min_price, p); return best.

canonical_solution_summary: Single pass tracking minimum price so far and max profit when selling at current price.
